_comment: PROVISIONAL SEED FIXTURES — Task 3 illustrative samples. Replaced by Task 4 (07-01 checkpoint:human-action) with REAL Cube AI captures from the deployed Railway build. Per Pitfall 7, the responseClassifierSystem.ts prompt body (Wave 1) MUST ground its per-class examples in real assistant text, not these seeds.

samples.assistantText: Did you mean by store, by region, or by category? I can also break it down by time period if you have a window in mind.
Q3 revenue was $4.2B, up 12% year-over-year, with NSW leading at $1.4B.
Filtering to the top 5 stores by sales volume — here are the updated numbers.
Switched to a pie chart so the share of total is more obvious.

Q3 highlights: revenue $4.2B (up 12% YoY), NSW leads at $1.4B (33% share), top category is fuel ($2.1B), top store cluster grew 18%, week-over-week trend was positive in 9 of 13 weeks. Margin compressed 80bps due to fuel mix. Outlook: Q4 guidance maintained.
I don't have forecasting capabilities — I can only report on data already in the warehouse.
